basic_info.title: Terranigma
basic_info.review: Terranigma is widely considered one of the greatest SNES action RPGs ever made, featuring an epic story about world creation and destruction, innovative combat mechanics, and a memorable soundtrack by Yuzo Koshiro.

previous_game.title: Landstalker: The Challenging Quest of Leo and Lina

play_today.details: The definitive version with the Redux patch applied. This provides bug fixes, NTSC conversion for 60fps, improved text formatting, retranslation closer to Japanese original, and rebalanced gameplay.

recommended_patches.name: Terranigma Redux
recommended_patches.description: Comprehensive improvement patch with bug fixes, NTSC conversion (60fps), 8x16 font for better text spacing, retranslation closer to Japanese original, and rebalanced weapons/armor/bosses. Version 1.5.1 is the latest stable release.

recommended_patches.name: Bloody Mary Improvement
recommended_patches.description: Boss balance fix that reduces Bloody Mary's defense from 59 to 47, making the fight fairer at levels 19-22 instead of requiring level 25+. Part of the Redux hack but available separately.

recommended_patches.name: NTSC Patch
recommended_patches.description: Converts PAL version to NTSC format for 60fps gameplay. Essential for optimal performance on emulators.

optimal_settings: High accuracy mode for best compatibility

play_today.details: Original PAL version without patches. Runs at 50fps with original English localization.

recommended_patches.name: NTSC Patch
recommended_patches.description: Converts PAL version to NTSC format for 60fps gameplay.

description.synopsis: A young hero named Ark must restore the world after it has been destroyed by a cosmic catastrophe. He travels through time and space, gathering power to rebuild civilization while battling forces of darkness.
key_features: Innovative action RPG combat system with multiple attack types
Epic story about creation and destruction of worlds
Memorable soundtrack composed by Yuzo Koshiro (ActRaiser, Phantasy Star IV)
Multiple endings based on player choices
Seamless world exploration without loading screens
description.long_description: Terranigma, known as Tenchi Sōzō in Japan, is a 1995 action RPG developed by Quintet and published by Enix. It was never officially released in North America due to Enix closing their US branch before localization could be completed. The game follows Ark, a young hero who must restore the world after it's been destroyed by a cosmic catastrophe. Players travel through time and space, gathering power to rebuild civilization while battling forces of darkness. The combat system is innovative for its time, featuring multiple attack types including physical attacks, magic spells, and special abilities. Yuzo Koshiro's soundtrack is widely regarded as one of the best on the SNES. Despite never receiving an official North American release, Terranigma has gained a cult following and is considered by many to be one of the greatest action RPGs ever made.
legacy_and_impact: Considered one of the greatest SNES games of all time
Part of Quintet's acclaimed Soul Blazer trilogy
Influential combat system that inspired later action RPGs
Yuzo Koshiro's soundtrack remains highly regarded decades after release
Cult classic with dedicated fan community creating improvement patches
